req_desc_origin: 实现一个具有上升沿触发的异步复位计数器，计数宽度为8bit，计数范围0-255，当计数达到最大值时自动清零
code_origin: module counter (input clk, input rst_n, output [7:0] count); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin if (!rst_n) count <= 8'b0; else count <= count + 1; end endmodule

req_desc_origin: 设计一个多路选择器，具有4个输入信号和2个控制信号，根据控制信号输出对应的输入
code_origin: module mux4to1 (input [3:0] in, input [1:0] sel, output out); assign out = in[sel]; endmodule

req_desc_origin: 实现一个频率为100MHz，分频比为10的时钟分频器，输出频率为10MHz
code_origin: module clk_div10 (input clk_in, input rst_n, output clk_out); reg [3:0] count; always @(posedge clk_in or negedge rst_n) begin if (!rst_n) begin count <= 0; clk_out <= 0; end else begin if (count == 4'd4) begin clk_out <= ~clk_out; count <= 0; end else count <= count + 1; end end endmodule

req_desc_origin: 设计一个移位寄存器，支持左移和右移，具有并行加载功能
code_origin: module shift_reg (input clk, input rst_n, input [3:0] data_in, input shift_en, input [1:0] mode, output [3:0] data_out); reg [3:0] reg_data; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin if (!rst_n) reg_data <= 4'b0; else if (shift_en) begin if (mode == 2'b00) reg_data <= {reg_data[2:0], data_in[0]}; else if (mode == 2'b01) reg_data <= {data_in[3], reg_data[3:1]}; end else reg_data <= data_in; end assign data_out = reg_data; endmodule

req_desc_origin: 实现一个优先级编码器，将8个输入中优先级最高的信号转换为3位二进制编码
code_origin: module priority_encoder (input [7:0] req, output [2:0] priority); always @(*) begin if (req[7]) priority = 3'd7; else if (req[6]) priority = 3'd6; else if (req[5]) priority = 3'd5; else if (req[4]) priority = 3'd4; else if (req[3]) priority = 3'd3; else if (req[2]) priority = 3'd2; else if (req[1]) priority = 3'd1; else priority = 3'b0; end endmodule
